completion_definition: M0 through M6 are complete, all acceptance criteria pass, and evidence contains real command or deployment results.
global_rules: Only one task may be in_progress at a time.
Never mark a task complete without validation evidence.
Update progress.md whenever task state changes.
Never commit source CSVs, secrets, or invented measurements.

tasks.title: Create repository governance
tasks.intent: Make project state and implementation rules discoverable to humans and coding agents.
implementation: Create AGENTS.md, agent.md, progress.md, tasks.json, .gitignore, and .env.example.
acceptance_criteria: Progress distinguishes evidence from planned work.
Tasks include dependencies, validation, and evidence fields.
evidence: Created during the 2026-06-13 implementation session.
tasks.notes: AGENTS.md is authoritative for auto-discovered agent instructions.

tasks.title: Configure Python, TypeScript, and CI tooling
tasks.intent: Provide deterministic install, lint, type-check, test, and build commands.
evidence: Python editable install completed.
Frontend npm install and production build completed on Node 22.16.
PR and protected live workflows created.
tasks.notes: Live-provider tests remain separate from pull-request CI.

tasks.title: Implement streaming source transform
tasks.intent: Produce a deterministic, validated load CSV without loading multi-GB inputs into memory.
implementation: Index only required ONSPD fields by canonical postcode.
acceptance_criteria: Join coverage is at least 99.9 percent.
All documented abort gates are enforced.
evidence: Streaming implementation and focused tests pass.
Prior source analysis recorded the exact 466368-row expected snapshot.
Exact checkpoints now require both validated source hashes; global ONSPD duplicate detection is disk-backed and memory-bounded.
Manifest and validation output include source/final date ranges and publish only after every staged artifact passes.
Full rebuild with the new implementation awaits district boundary input.

2026-06-13: scripts/build_local_sqlite.py streamed /Users/moel/Downloads/pp-complete.csv and ONSPD_Online_Latest_Centroids_-966716609290186519.csv through the same source gates and built data/local/lpe-local.sqlite3 with 466,368 rows, 2021-01-01 to 2026-04-30, and 279 postcode districts.
tasks.notes: ONSPD postcode lookup fits memory; PPD must remain fully streamed.

tasks.title: Create PostGIS schema and loader
tasks.intent: Create the canonical read-only spatial database and fast bulk load path.
implementation: Load transactions, districts, metadata, and precomputed low-zoom clusters.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical queries execute against fixture PostGIS.
validation_commands: .venv/bin/ruff format --check scripts/load_database.py api/app/db/queries.py api/app/db/repository.py api/app/db/sqlite_repository.py api/app/services/data.py api/tests/test_sqlite_repository.py
.venv/bin/ruff check scripts/load_database.py api/app/db/queries.py api/app/db/repository.py api/app/db/sqlite_repository.py api/app/services/data.py api/tests/test_sqlite_repository.py
evidence: DDL and remote-safe client-side loader implemented and statically verified.
Schema, app_reader password, bulk copy, row count, analyze, and predicted size gate execute in one rollback-safe transaction.

2026-06-14: pipeline/output generated from the validated local PPD/ONSPD files plus uk-postcode-polygons: transactions.csv 58 MB, districts.geojson 329,301 bytes, validation-report valid=true, final_rows=466,368, district_count=279, join_coverage=0.999993567725419.

2026-06-14: Supabase load via session pooler completed with 466,368 transactions, 279 districts, 279 district_stats rows, 992 cluster_cells rows, 1 dataset_meta row, relation_bytes=136,470,528, database_bytes=155,913,363.

2026-06-14: app_reader API smoke against Supabase returned health 200, meta total 466,368/date range 2021-01-01..2026-04-30, clusters_z11 701 cells, binary points 25,000 rows with X-Truncated=true, 279 district stats rows, districts GeoJSON 329,301 bytes, and SW11 4NB history count 4.
tasks.notes: Direct Supabase host was IPv6-only from this environment, so local validation used the Supabase session pooler with asyncpg statement caching disabled.

tasks.title: Implement API foundation and data endpoints
tasks.intent: Serve the documented public read contract from PostGIS.
implementation: Create settings, lifecycle, pool, errors, middleware, repositories, services, and routes.
Implement all core endpoints and capability flags.
acceptance_criteria: CORS and cache policies match the specification.
evidence: FastAPI routes pass fixture-backed contract tests.
Generated docs/openapi.yaml now comes from the running FastAPI schema.
2026-06-13: Local FastAPI served real-data /api/meta, /api/transactions clusters, /api/postcode/SW11%204NB/history, and /api/district-stats from data/local/lpe-local.sqlite3.
2026-06-13: /api/transactions request logging now records mode and count; chat/stream/feedback now set no-store.

2026-06-14: /api/transactions now accepts validated tenures=F,L filters, applies them in PostGIS and local SQLite paths, bypasses precomputed clusters for exact tenure-filtered results, and rejects invalid/duplicate tenure params. Full backend ruff format/check, mypy, and api pytest pass.
tasks.notes: Tests use dependency overrides and a fake repository where PostGIS is unavailable.

tasks.title: Implement LPE1 binary transport
tasks.intent: Provide bounded low-overhead point transport synchronized with schema.js.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid postcodes, dates, and types fail closed.
JSON and binary select identical ordered rows.
evidence: Python binary tests and JavaScript decoder golden test pass.
Wire size remains exactly 8+23N.
2026-06-13: Real-data binary GET returned 200 application/octet-stream, LPE1 magic, 25,000 rows, 575,008 bytes, and X-Truncated: true.
tasks.notes: Do not change LPE1 without a version bump.

tasks.title: Implement map data loop and layers
tasks.intent: Render clusters, points, and districts from viewport-bounded data without blocking interaction.
implementation: Create app shell and map overlay.
Implement fetch cancellation, debounce, cache, binary worker, and layers.
evidence: Vitest cache/truncation tests pass.
Production frontend build passes and binary worker emits typed deck.gl attributes.
District data is lazy-loaded on first use and cluster labels render from aggregate counts.
2026-06-13: In-app browser against local real data showed header 466,368 sales, clusters status 309,289 sales loaded, and point-mode status Transactions · 25,000+ loaded — zoom in.
tasks.notes: The map is the first screen, not a landing page.

tasks.title: Implement product interactions and responsive UI
tasks.intent: Complete filters, legends, property history, errors, accessibility, and mobile behavior.
implementation: Build card, sparkline, choropleth, and mobile layouts.
acceptance_criteria: Truncation and centroid limitations remain visible.
evidence: Five Playwright journeys pass across desktop and mobile projects; the detailed desktop toolbar journey is intentionally skipped on mobile because those controls collapse into the mobile filter drawer.
Desktop and 390x844 layouts visually inspected in the in-app browser.
Playwright verifies no eager district request and that Apply/Undo restores the previous layer mode.
2026-06-13: Added London maxBounds, initial zoom 11, detailed point hover content, Esc close for history, explicit stream-event validation through schema.js, and fixed package engines metadata.

2026-06-14: Sidebar, toolbar menus, search, save/report/automation actions, notification/account/help/settings toasts, tenure/date/property filters, planning/transport toggles, AI insight shortcuts, and suggested Copilot actions now have functional handlers.

2026-06-14: Playwright CLI smoke against real Supabase-backed localhost applied Terraced + Leasehold filters, opened SW11 4NB history with rendered rows, and reported zero console errors after adding an inline favicon.

2026-06-14: Fixed the frontend schema to accept canonical HMLR GUIDs in transaction/history payloads; added regression coverage and verified the live history panel no longer shows a UUID validation error.

2026-06-14: Improved map visual design with smaller cluster scaling, soft halos, fewer high-volume labels, tone-coded tooltips, refined choropleth strokes, updated legend marks, and glass/vignette map overlays. Frontend lint/build and Playwright e2e pass; in-app Browser screenshot reported zero logs.
tasks.notes: Use familiar icon buttons with tooltips where appropriate.

tasks.title: Measure and optimize
tasks.intent: Meet documented budgets with measured evidence rather than estimates.
implementation: Run SQL, payload, decode, render, and interaction protocols.
acceptance_criteria: Hard ceilings pass or deviation is explicitly approved.
evidence: Production bundle currently measures about 573 KB gzip for the main JavaScript chunk.
Database, endpoint, decode, and interaction measurements require the loaded full stack.
tasks.notes: Cannot complete without running the full stack and real dataset.

tasks.title: Deploy and verify durability
implementation: Deploy Render services and Supabase schema.
evidence: Render Blueprint and smoke script implemented.
No deployment URL, 24-hour check, or 7-day check exists yet.
tasks.notes: Requires external credentials and provider setup.

tasks.title: Implement Pinecone knowledge ingestion
tasks.intent: Build a versioned evidence corpus for explanatory answers without embedding transactions.
implementation: Chunk by headings and upsert deterministic records.
acceptance_criteria: Every chunk has complete provenance metadata.
Retrieval recall@5 is at least 90 percent.
evidence: Deterministic chunking tests pass and provenance metadata is implemented.
Live Pinecone namespace build and recall evaluation remain pending.
tasks.notes: Starter indexes are AWS us-east-1; namespace promotion is an environment change.

tasks.title: Implement typed LangGraph workflow
tasks.intent: Route SQL, RAG, hybrid, map action, and unsupported requests through explicit bounded nodes.
implementation: Implement tools, citations, verification, retries, and degradation.
acceptance_criteria: Numeric groundedness and citation validity are 100 percent.
Hard timeout and cost cap are enforced.
evidence: SQL and RAG graph tests pass with fake providers.
Grounding, redaction, route refusal, cost, and timeout paths are implemented.

2026-06-14: Added configurable model provider selection with Anthropic direct and OpenRouter gateways. OpenRouter uses the OpenAI-compatible LangChain adapter with server-side OPENROUTER_API_KEY, model, base URL, and optional attribution headers. Focused AI tests pass without live credentials.

2026-06-14: Hardened OpenRouter for live Anthropic routing with prompt JSON plus local Pydantic validation after provider-side structured output rejected a oneOf schema. Full backend ruff, mypy, and pytest pass.

2026-06-14: With a local OpenRouter key configured and Supabase active, POST /api/chat answered a SQL dataset-count question with 466,368 sales, route=sql, model=anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5, grounding passed, latency_ms=7599, tokens=1090/126, estimated_cost_usd=0.00172.
tasks.notes: No hidden chain-of-thought is exposed; steps are execution facts.

tasks.title: Add streaming, citations, feedback, traces, and eval gates
tasks.intent: Make agent behavior inspectable, measurable, correctable, and regression-resistant.
implementation: Add chat, SSE, and feedback endpoints.
Add LangSmith redacted tracing and versioned eval datasets.
acceptance_criteria: First SSE event p95 is below 1 second.
Task success is at least 90 percent.
Typical and p95 cost targets pass.
Reviewed negative feedback can become an eval case.
evidence: Deterministic replay achieved 100% route accuracy, 100% unsupported refusal, and zero critical injection failures.

2026-06-14: POST /api/chat/stream emitted run_started, step_started, completed execution steps, and final for the same OpenRouter SQL smoke; final route=sql, answer count=466,368, latency_ms=3822, estimated_cost_usd=0.00172.

2026-06-14: Browser UI test submitted SQL, map-action, and unsupported prompts through the Copilot. SQL count returned 466,368 sales with visible grounding steps; Highlight SW11 produced a reversible map action and visible Undo; weather question refused cleanly; browser console errors were empty.
Live latency, cost, retrieval, and task-success gates remain intentionally incomplete.
tasks.notes: LangSmith outage degrades tracing but must not break SQL/map features.

tasks.title: Run complete release verification
tasks.intent: Prove all contracts, quality gates, quotas, and user journeys before completion.
acceptance_criteria: README and progress ledger match deployed reality.
validation_commands: ruff check api pipeline evals scripts
tasks.notes: This is the only task that marks the project complete.
